历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 69481→74839→73774→88967→89552, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 15778 places in the last 3 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 89552; the university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province for Physics Category was 44 in 2021, 60 in 2022, 66 in 2023, 72 in 2024, and 75 in 2025, with annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 83, an increase of 8 (+10.7%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 195th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2025), with a slight decline in recent years, overall in the middle-to-lower segment; no significant public opinion incidents recorded in the reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking 30th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 1.38 million, short video exposure mainly focusing on campus life and admission letter unboxing, with moderate-to-high attention, having a certain positive driving effect on applications; Tibet University in the fifth round of discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society; the university's Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, etc., have higher rankings, matching popular directions; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is about 609,800, estimated at about 365,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 59.8%, a slight increase from the 2025 Physics Category of 363,000; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch rose from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, showing an upward trend year by year, reflecting overall tightening competition; Tibet University is located in Lhasa, a remote area university, and the regional preference for cross-province study may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; the university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province has increased year by year, while the local candidate scale has also expanded simultaneously, with supply and demand both growing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift of historical rankings, the planned enrollment expansion of about 10.7% in 2026, the slight increase in the number of candidates in the province, and the upward trend of the provincial control line and other intensifying competition factors, based on the 2025 baseline of 89552, the ranking is expected to shift further backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 95483, with a range of 94983–95983.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 21893→17303→17182→13641→19979, with significant fluctuations. In 2024, it dropped to the lowest point of 13641, then rebounded sharply to 19979 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of over 6300 places in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 19979. The enrollment plan for this university in Hebei Province's History Category was 35 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 38 in 2025, showing a trend of first contraction then expansion. The 2026 plan is 30, a reduction of 8 (-21.1%) compared to 2025, a significant contraction, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 195th in the Soft Science China University Rankings (2025), with a slight decline in recent years, overall in the middle-lower segment. No significant public opinion incidents recorded in the reputation file. Douyin popularity ranking 30th (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 1.38 million, short video exposure mainly focused on campus life and admission letter unboxing, with moderate to high attention. Tibet University in the fifth round of discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Ideological and Political Education and other liberal arts majors are socially hot or in a wait-and-see state. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 609,800, with an estimated 245,000 in the History Category based on the recent proportion of about 40.2%, a slight increase from the 244,000 in 2025. The provincial control line for the History Category undergraduate batch rose to 477 in 2025, a significant increase from 449 in 2024, reflecting tightening competition. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, a remote area university, and cross-provincial study preferences may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. The enrollment plan for this university in Hebei Province's History Category fluctuates significantly, and the 2026 contraction may further affect application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the 2026 plan contraction of about 21.1%, a slight increase in local candidates, and the upward trend of the provincial control line, the contraction's effect of pushing rankings forward outweighs the backward effect of intensified competition. Based on the 2025 baseline of 19979, the ranking is expected to move forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 17356, with a range of 16856–17856.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 西藏大学医学类在河北省近五年最低录取位次呈持续上升趋势：2021年68600名（计划8人）、2022年74839名（计划10人）、2023年73774名（计划11人）、2024年79669名（计划 12人）、2025年89552名（计划14人）。五年间位次累计上升20952名，年均上升约4180名，尤其2025年较2024年大幅上升9883名，反映医学类报考热度显著增强。2026年医学类招 生计划为15人（临床医学5人、护理学4人、预防医学4人、口腔医学2人），较2025年扩招1人，扩招幅度约7.14%，扩招对位次有轻微下拉作用，但不足以逆转整体上升趋势。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西藏大学是国家211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，位于西藏自治区拉萨市，是西藏自治区唯一一所综合性大学。作为边疆地区重点高校，其医学类专业依托地域特色 ，在高原医学、藏医药等领域具有独特优势，对有志于边疆医疗卫生事业和民族地区发展的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续保持高报考热度，临床医学、口腔医学等专业竞争尤为激烈。西藏大学医学类在河北省招生规模较小（2026年仅15人），稀缺性进一步推高竞争程 度。拉萨地处青藏高原，地域特殊性使得部分考生因气候、海拔等因素有所顾虑，但同时吸引对高原医学和边疆发展感兴趣的考生群体，整体报考热度稳中有升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年西藏大学医学类在河北省最低录取位次约为93590名，较2025年上升4038名。位次持续上升主要受医学报考热度增强、招生规模有 限等因素驱动。预计录取位次大概率落在93090至94090区间内，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿梯度。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Tibet University's medical programs in Hebei Province have shown a continuous upward trend over the past five years: 68,600th place in 2021 (planned enrollment of 8), 74,839th in 2022 (10), 73,774th in 2023 (11), 79,669th in 2024 (12), and 89,552nd in 2025 (14). Over five years, the ranking has risen by a cumulative total of 20,952 places, with an average annual increase of approximately 4,180 places. Notably, the ranking in 2025 surged by 9,883 places compared to 2024, reflecting a significant increase in the popularity of medical programs. In 2026, the planned enrollment for medical programs is 15 (Clinical Medicine 5, Nursing 4, Preventive Medicine 4, Stomatology 2), an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, representing an expansion rate of about 7.14%. This expansion has a slight downward pull on rankings but is insufficient to reverse the overall upward trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University is a key national university under the 211 Project and has been selected for the Double First-Class initiative. Located in Lhasa, Tibet Autonomous Region, it is the only comprehensive university in the region. As a key university in the border area, its medical programs leverage regional characteristics, offering unique advantages in fields such as high-altitude medicine and Tibetan medicine, which strongly attract candidates interested in border healthcare and ethnic regional development.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs nationwide continue to maintain high application popularity, with intense competition in specialties like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology. Tibet University's medical programs have a small enrollment scale in Hebei Province (only 15 in 2026), and this scarcity further intensifies competition. Lhasa is located on the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau, and the regional uniqueness leads some candidates to have concerns about climate and altitude, while simultaneously attracting candidates interested in high-altitude medicine and border development. Overall, application popularity is steadily rising.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Integrating the supply-demand elasticity model with historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Tibet University's medical programs in Hebei Province in 2026 will be approximately 93,590th place, an increase of 4,038 places compared to 2025. The continuous rise in rankings is mainly driven by the increasing popularity of medical programs and limited enrollment scale. The predicted admission ranking is likely to fall within the range of 93,090 to 94,090. Candidates are advised to plan their application gradient reasonably within this range.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety option.
